requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — INACAL NTP / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——INACAL NTP/IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——INACAL NTP/IEC 62133

summary.en: Peru's national standards body, INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad), issues Normas Tecnicas Peruanas (NTP) that adopt the international IEC 62133 series for the safety of portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries. The reference benchmark is IEC 62133-2 (lithium systems): abuse and safety testing covering overcharge, external short-circuit, crush/impact, forced discharge, thermal abuse, vibration, and mechanical drop. NTP adoption of an IEC standard is, by default, voluntary unless that standard is referenced by a Reglamento Tecnico (mandatory technical regulation) issued through PRODUCE/INDECOPI for the specific product category — in which case third-party certification of conformity to the NTP/IEC requirement becomes mandatory for that category at import. Where mandatory, conformity is shown by a certificate of conformity from an INACAL-accredited or recognised certification body, supported by a test report to the IEC 62133 method. The 220 V / 60 Hz Peruvian grid affects the AC charger/adapter shipped with a power bank more than the cell chemistry, but charger safety is assessed under the relevant IEC 60335 / IEC 62368 family adopted as NTP.
summary.zh: 秘鲁国家标准机构INACAL（国家质量研究院）颁布的秘鲁技术标准（NTP）采纳国际IEC 62133系列，用于便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池的安全。基准为IEC 62133-2（锂系统）：滥用与安全测试涵盖过充、外部短路、挤压/撞击、强制放电、热滥用、振动及机械跌落。NTP采纳某IEC标准在默认情况下为自愿性，除非该标准被针对特定产品类别、经PRODUCE/INDECOPI颁布的技术规章（Reglamento Tecnico，强制性技术法规）引用——此时该类别在进口时须强制进行符合NTP/IEC要求的第三方符合性认证。在强制情形下，符合性通过由INACAL认可或承认的认证机构出具的符合性证书证明，并以依据IEC 62133方法的测试报告支持。秘鲁220 V/60 Hz电网对随移动电源附带的交流充电器/适配器的影响大于对电芯化学体系的影响，而充电器安全依据采纳为NTP的相关IEC 60335/IEC 62368系列评估。
summary.zht: 秘魯國家標準機構INACAL（國家品質研究院）頒布的秘魯技術標準（NTP）採納國際IEC 62133系列，用於便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池的安全。基準為IEC 62133-2（鋰系統）：濫用與安全測試涵蓋過充、外部短路、擠壓/撞擊、強制放電、熱濫用、振動及機械跌落。NTP採納某IEC標準在預設情況下為自願性，除非該標準被針對特定產品類別、經PRODUCE/INDECOPI頒布的技術規章（Reglamento Tecnico，強制性技術法規）引用——此時該類別在進口時須強制進行符合NTP/IEC要求的第三方符合性認證。在強制情形下，符合性透過由INACAL認可或承認的認證機構出具的符合性證書證明，並以依據IEC 62133方法的測試報告支持。秘魯220 V/60 Hz電網對隨行動電源附帶的交流充電器/適配器的影響大於對電芯化學體系的影響，而充電器安全依據採納為NTP的相關IEC 60335/IEC 62368系列評估。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (basis for the adopted NTP)
NTP adopting IEC 62133 series — issued by INACAL (Direccion de Normalizacion) under Ley No. 30224
Reglamento Tecnico (where issued via PRODUCE/INDECOPI) — makes conformity certification to the referenced NTP/IEC requirement mandatory for the covered category

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory report to GB 31241 demonstrates Chinese domestic conformity but is not automatically accepted as a certificate of conformity to a Peruvian NTP/IEC 62133 requirement. Because the Peruvian benchmark is the IEC 62133 series itself, an IEC 62133-2 test report from an IECEE CB-scheme laboratory is generally far more directly usable for Peru than a GB-only report.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则上存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的报告可证明中国国内符合性，但不会自动被接受为符合秘鲁NTP/IEC 62133要求的符合性证书。由于秘鲁基准即IEC 62133系列本身，来自IECEE CB体系实验室的IEC 62133-2测试报告对秘鲁的可用性通常远高于仅有GB的报告。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則上存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的報告可證明中國國內符合性，但不會自動被接受為符合秘魯NTP/IEC 62133要求的符合性證書。由於秘魯基準即IEC 62133系列本身，來自IECEE CB體系實驗室的IEC 62133-2測試報告對秘魯的可用性通常遠高於僅有GB的報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Peru benchmarks safety against the IEC 62133 series adopted as NTP, not against GB 31241. The practical gap for Chinese exporters: (1) where a Reglamento Tecnico makes the NTP mandatory for the category, a certificate of conformity (not just a self-issued GB report) is required at import; (2) GB 31241 national deviations mean a GB report may not be directly transferable — an IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB test report is the cleaner route; (3) the AC charger/adapter accompanying a power bank must be safe for the 220 V / 60 Hz Peruvian grid under the adopted IEC 60335 / IEC 62368 NTP, and the 60 Hz frequency (vs China's 50 Hz) should be confirmed for any mains-frequency-sensitive charging electronics. Unlike the EU lane, there is no CE marking, no EU Declaration of Conformity, and no harmonised-standard presumption-of-conformity mechanism — Peru relies on NTP conformity certification where mandated.
gap.zh: 秘鲁的安全基准是采纳为NTP的IEC 62133系列，而非GB 31241。中国出口商的实际差距：（1）当技术规章使该NTP对该类别成为强制时，进口须有符合性证书（而非仅自行出具的GB报告）；（2）GB 31241的国家偏差意味着GB报告可能不可直接转用——IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB测试报告是更清晰的路径；（3）随移动电源附带的交流充电器/适配器须依据采纳为NTP的IEC 60335/IEC 62368对秘鲁220 V/60 Hz电网安全，且对任何对市电频率敏感的充电电子，应确认60 Hz（相对中国50 Hz）。与欧盟通道不同，秘鲁没有CE标志、没有欧盟符合性声明、也没有协调标准的符合性推定机制——在强制情形下秘鲁依赖NTP符合性认证。
gap.zht: 秘魯的安全基準是採納為NTP的IEC 62133系列，而非GB 31241。中國出口商的實際差距：（1）當技術規章使該NTP對該類別成為強制時，進口須有符合性證書（而非僅自行出具的GB報告）；（2）GB 31241的國家偏差意味著GB報告可能不可直接轉用——IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB測試報告是更清晰的路徑；（3）隨行動電源附帶的交流充電器/適配器須依據採納為NTP的IEC 60335/IEC 62368對秘魯220 V/60 Hz電網安全，且對任何對市電頻率敏感的充電電子，應確認60 Hz（相對中國50 Hz）。與歐盟通道不同，秘魯沒有CE標誌、沒有歐盟符合性聲明、也沒有協調標準的符合性推定機制——在強制情形下秘魯依賴NTP符合性認證。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62133 adopted as NTP is voluntary by default, but becomes mandatory (requiring a certificate of conformity at import) where a Reglamento Tecnico via PRODUCE/INDECOPI references it for the product category; charger safety under adopted IEC 60335/IEC 62368 NTP
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru benchmarks lithium cell/pack safety on the IEC 62133 series adopted by INACAL as NTP. This is voluntary unless a Reglamento Tecnico makes it mandatory for the category, in which case an import-stage certificate of conformity is needed. A GB 31241 report alone may not transfer cleanly due to national deviations; an IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB report is the more usable basis. Confirm the accompanying AC charger is safe for 220 V / 60 Hz under the adopted IEC 60335 / 62368 NTP. There is no CE-style presumption-of-conformity route in Peru.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁以INACAL采纳为NTP的IEC 62133系列作为锂电芯/电池组安全基准。除非技术规章使其对该类别成为强制（此时需进口阶段符合性证书），否则为自愿。仅有GB 31241报告可能因国家偏差而不可直接转用；IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB报告是更可用的基础。须确认随附交流充电器在220 V/60 Hz下依据采纳为NTP的IEC 60335/62368是安全的。秘鲁不存在CE式符合性推定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯以INACAL採納為NTP的IEC 62133系列作為鋰電芯/電池組安全基準。除非技術規章使其對該類別成為強制（此時需進口階段符合性證書），否則為自願。僅有GB 31241報告可能因國家偏差而不可直接轉用；IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB報告是更可用的基礎。須確認隨附交流充電器在220 V/60 Hz下依據採納為NTP的IEC 60335/62368是安全的。秘魯不存在CE式符合性推定路徑。

source.publisher: INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad (Direccion de Normalizacion, Gobierno del Peru)
